feedback.text: We shouldn't have to ask permission to install any type of software to a Software company. You can install anything you want on your computer, it should be the same on your phone/tablet/Smart TV etc This is a way for Google to track devs that don't comply with their ecosystem. Nothing more than that, and if we allow them to restrict this, even Government apps will require this sort of "verification". As someone working in the IT/Cloud Field, please i'm begging there is nonother alternative than to stop this. For so many reasons i could go on for hours.
